title: prunus × cistena
intro: Prunus × cistena is a hybrid plant, also known as the Cistena plum, resulting from the cross between Prunus cerasifera (a cherry plum) and Prunus fruticosa (an oval-leaf plum). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and antiseptic qualities, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Prunus × cistena include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Prunus × cistena can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
